title: Tier-based rate limiting middleware
acceptance_criteria: Looks up key in signals_api_keys to determine tier
Enforces per-tier limits: Free=100/day, Pro=10000/day, Enterprise=100000/day
429 response with JSON body when limit exceeded: {code: 'rate_limited', message: '...', retry_after: seconds}
Graceful handling when Redis unavailable (allow request, log warning)
